name: Malleus Draconia & Lilia Vanrouge (Double Menace)
description:
◜The two most powerful men of the Diasomnia dorm (and the whole of Night Raven College) have their eyes set on you and you alone.◞

—✧—

—✧ this bot includes two people, so the replies might be a little long and might get a bit wonky.

—✧ remember you can edit out their replies if you see something you don't like and the bot will listen and act accordingly. for example, if they write as you, edit it and delete it before replying, or swipe for a different reply.

—✧ i am not responsible for what the bots do.
